summary: Workshop Booking Funnel + Box Designer UX e2e testing. Backend 21/21 pytest pass on /app/backend/tests/test_workshops.py (public workshops, sessions, bookings with deposit/full pricing math, oversell rejection, Stripe checkout URL, admin auth gating, admin CRUD with session-blocking delete, webhook branch presence, and regression for products/boxes/cards/templates/login). Frontend: /workshops renders 3 cards with Book/Details; modal opens, sessions load, step 2 reached, all required data-testids present, deposit↔full toggles update summary, 5% off badge shown, full booking flow created and redirected to checkout.stripe.com. /workshops/:slug detail page renders + unknown slug returns 'Workshop not found'. Admin Workshops tab present with sub-tabs and Add Programme/Add Date modals. Box Designer opened from admin Templates: Arrange controls (front/forward/backward/back) all render and are clickable without error; designer-edit-text-inline button opens inline textarea overlay appended to document.body (verified 1 body-direct textarea after click).

issues: Sub-tab data-testid for the Programmes tab is `workshops-subtab-workshops` (id from internal state key) while the label is 'Programmes'. The review_request expected `workshops-subtab-programmes`. Cosmetic/test-id naming only — tab works. Consider aligning the id to `programmes` for consistency with the user-visible label.

passed_tests: GET /api/workshops/christmas-door-wreath → 200 with price 95, deposit 45, discount_pct 5; unknown slug → 404
POST /api/workshop-bookings deposit 2 guests @95 → subtotal £190, amount_due_now £90, balance £100, discount £0
POST /api/workshop-bookings full 1 guest @95 → subtotal £95, amount_due_now £90.25, discount £4.75, balance £0
POST /api/workshop-checkout/session returns url containing stripe.com and amount==booking.amount_due_now
Static check: webhook `kind == 'workshop_booking'` branch present in server.py
Frontend /workshops: workshops-page renders, 3 workshop-card-* tiles, 3 Book + 3 Details buttons
Frontend modal: workshop-booking-modal opens, workshop-session-* render, Continue → workshop-booking-step-details
Frontend pricing UI: full-payment card shows '5% OFF' badge; deposit summary shows £45/£50 split; full summary shows £4.75 discount and £90.25 due
Frontend redirect: clicking Pay & book navigates to https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_…
Frontend /workshops/christmas-door-wreath: workshop-detail-page, title 'Christmas Door Wreath Workshop', Book CTA, 2 upcoming-session cards; /workshops/does-not-exist shows 'Workshop not found'
Admin /admin → admin-workshops-tab: sub-tabs Sessions/Bookings present, Add Programme opens workshops-edit-form modal

Box Designer (from admin Templates → Add template): box-designer modal opens, Add Text creates a layer, designer-arrange-controls + bring-to-front/forward/backward/to-back all present and clickable, designer-edit-text-inline opens an inline textarea appended to document.body (1 body-direct textarea observed)
action_items: (Cosmetic, optional) Rename the Programmes sub-tab id from 'workshops' to 'programmes' in /app/frontend/src/components/admin/WorkshopsAdmin.js so data-testid='workshops-subtab-programmes' matches the visible label and the spec. Functional behaviour is unaffected.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is now 2707 lines — well above the 700-line guideline. Strongly recommend splitting into modular routers (auth, catalog, portfolio, orders, workshops, templates, admin) to keep the codebase maintainable. The workshop block alone is ~330 lines and is self-contained, making it a natural extraction candidate (e.g. routers/workshops.py).
Workshop seed inside server.py duplicates WORKSHOP_SEED data; consider moving seed data to a json/seed module.

Some workshop endpoints depend on session.get('spots_booked', 0) — the spots_booked counter is only incremented in /workshop-checkout/status (paid path). If a booking is created but the user abandons Stripe, the capacity stays available, which is correct, but the rejected-when-full logic uses spots_booked. Ensure the webhook handler also increments spots_booked when paid (it does, verified in lines 850-870).
test_credentials: admin@petalsatelier.com / admin123 (verified working; used to access /admin → Workshops tab and Templates → Box Designer)
seed_data_creation: No new seed needed — relied on existing 3 workshops + 6 sessions. Added 2-3 TEST_ bookings during pricing assertions; one ephemeral admin-created workshop+session was created and deleted in the CRUD test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workshop pytest is at /app/backend/tests/test_workshops.py. Both christmas-door-wreath sessions are still available (oversell test uses a temporary capacity=1 session and cleans up). The booking flow does redirect to a real Stripe checkout URL; no payment is actually completed during tests. Box Designer is most easily accessed via /admin → Templates → Add template (TemplatesAdmin opens BoxDesigner). The Box Designer inline-edit textarea is appended directly to document.body (verifiable via `document.querySelectorAll('body > textarea').length === 1` after clicking designer-edit-text-inline).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Only one cosmetic test-id naming inconsistency (workshops-subtab-workshops vs. expected workshops-subtab-programmes).
